_comment: Template fragment embedded into each session's <session-dir>/.claude/settings.local.json by scripts/scaffold-autosession.sh — NOT merged into global ~/.claude/settings.json. Session-scoped hooks mean these commands ONLY fire when Claude Code is launched from a session dir; interactive sessions never see them. scaffold-autosession.sh wraps each command via scripts/lib/hook-wrapper.sh at scaffold time, so the rendered settings.local.json has the full wrapper invocation, not the raw inner script.
_env_contract: The wrapped commands require AUTOSESSION_SLUG and AUTOSESSION_DIR in the environment. run.sh exports both before calling `exec claude`, so any hook that fires under that claude process inherits them. See run.sh.tmpl.
